title: set of four handy containers - plastic storage by Sozali
features: SOZALI set of four mobile phone containers – Plastic Storage
description: Set of 4 1 x 0.22 litre 1 x 0.9litre, 1 x 1.5 Litre, 1 x 2.4litre, works as genuine parts, 100% air tight food grade containers microwave safe, dishwasher safe, freezer safe and stackable; no smell, tough, waterproof and airtight, suitable for temperatures: 40 °C – 110 °C (40 °F – 230 °F)

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Dishwasher safe, microwave safe, freezer safe, and stackable. Hand wash is not recommended.
specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Air Tight, Microwave Safe, Dishwasher Safe, Freezer Safe, Stackable
